name: three-role-model
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the 3-role development model: planner -> plan-review -> executor -> execution-review, each a separate subagent, never self-review. Also ships Autonomous Pipeline Mode (approve once, then run the pipeline) — the stop-check + post-compact resume-sequencer hooks and doctrine.

plugins.name: three-role-model
plugins.description: The 3-role development model (planner -> plan-review -> executor -> execution-review, never self-review) plus Autonomous Pipeline Mode (approve once, then run — stop-check + post-compact resume-sequencer hooks and doctrine), as installable hooks, skills, commands, and doctrine.
